title: AI Auto-Tagger
description: Automatically tag responses using AI based on definitions you provide

createTag.sectionDescription: Create tags for this form. Tags created here will appear in the definitions section below and in the Responses table.

tagDefinitions.title: AI Definitions
tagDefinitions.description: Add a definition for each tag to tell the AI when to apply it. Only tags with a definition will be auto-tagged.
tagDefinitions.hint: Only tags with a definition will be considered by the AI. Tags without definitions are skipped.
tagDefinitions.noTags: No tags yet. Use the section above to create your first tag.
tagDefinitions.definitionLabel: When should AI apply this tag?
tagDefinitions.definitionPlaceholder: e.g., Response mentions a billing issue, payment problem, or invoice query
